summary: Innovative and results-driven **Senior Application Engineer** with proven success in **full-stack development, cloud architecture, and scalable enterprise solutions** across healthcare and technology domains. Adept at **leading cross-functional teams, architecting complex systems, and delivering high-performance applications** that improve user experience and business efficiency. Recognized for **technical versatility, problem-solving excellence, and mentoring talent** to achieve engineering excellence.

15+ years of experience designing, developing, and scaling **full-stack enterprise applications** in healthcare and technology. Expert in **React, .NET, Node.js, Python and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure)** with advanced skills in **AI/ML, large language models (LLMs)**. Hands-on in developing **APIs, microservices, and modernizing legacy systems into cloud-native environments**, reducing costs and improving reliability. Recognized for **mentoring engineers, leading cross-functional teams, and aligning technical strategy with business goals**.
Senior Architect with 15+ years of experience building **scalable cloud-native systems and AI-driven platforms across healthcare and enterprise domains**.

Currently leading development of a large-scale Document AI platform on **GCP, including document ingestion APIs, event-driven processing pipelines, and Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) validation systems integrated with enterprise platforms.**
**Strong expertise in FastAPI, Node.js, React/Angular, and cloud platforms (GCP, AWS, Azure),** with a focus on designing **secure, scalable, and high-performance distributed systems.**
Passionate about solving **complex engineering problems, mentoring teams, and delivering production-grade systems under tight timelines.**
